Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 117 upvotes, 17 comments
  2. I tried Karpathy's Autoresearch on an old research project 15 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Side-Effectful Expressions in C (2023) 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon 532 upvotes, 143 comments
  5. US govt pays TotalEnergies nearly $1B to stop US offshore wind projects 59 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. The quadratic problem nobody fixed 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. The machine didn't take your craft. You gave it up 16 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 47 upvotes, 13 comments
  9. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 184 upvotes, 73 comments
  10. PC Gamer recommends RSS readers in a 37mb article that just keeps downloading 777 upvotes, 357 comments
  11. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 75 upvotes, 25 comments
  12. Digs: Offline-first iOS app to browse your Discogs vinyl collection 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  13. “Collaboration” is bullshit 182 upvotes, 86 comments
  14. GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability 359 upvotes, 188 comments
  15. The future of version control 627 upvotes, 351 comments
  16. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 295 upvotes, 171 comments
  17. If DSPy is so great, why isn't anyone using it? 164 upvotes, 98 comments
  18. Show HN: The King Wen Permutation: [52, 10, 2] 50 upvotes, 24 comments
  19. Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website 315 upvotes, 219 comments
  20. Reports of code's death are greatly exaggerated 543 upvotes, 407 comments
  21. Migrating to the EU 699 upvotes, 561 comments
  22. Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids 281 upvotes, 229 comments
  23. Is it a pint? 115 upvotes, 104 comments
  24. Show HN: Threadprocs – executables sharing one address space (0-copy pointers) 39 upvotes, 29 comments
  25. Cyber.mil serving file downloads using TLS certificate which expired 3 days ago 112 upvotes, 105 comments
  26. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 112 upvotes, 129 comments
  27. General Motors is assisting with the restoration of a rare EV1 69 upvotes, 78 comments
  28. Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded in the US 111 upvotes, 145 comments
  29. Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia 155 upvotes, 276 comments
  30. GoGoGrandparent (YC S16) is hiring Back end Engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 3:00am, 24 March 2026. Source here.
